title: Mark Brooks

'''Mark Brooks''' is an artist who contributed sketch cards for the ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Trading Card Set]]''. He currently works as a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] artist for [[Marvel Comics]], where he provided artwork for the ''[[Star Wars: Han Solo]]'' miniseries. [[George Lucas]] expressed an interest in purchasing Brooks' original art pages for the [[Han Solo 1|first]] and [[Han Solo 2|second issues]] of the series.<ref name="LucasBuysArtwork">{{WebCite|url=http://www.hollywoodreporter.com/heat-vision/star-wars-george-lucas-wants-916537|text=Marvel reveals ''Star Wars'': George Lucas Wants to Buy Han Solo Comic Artwork|author=Flesch, Eli|date=2016-08-02|work=Hollywood Reporter|archivedate=20160805202644}}</ref> He also created the cover art for eleven issues of ''[[Star Wars: Kanan]]'' and all five issues of the ''[[Star Wars: Vader Down]]'' crossover.

Brooks has also drawn various other Marvel series, including [[W:c:marvel:Dark Reign: Young Avengers Vol 1|''Dark Reign: Young Avengers'']], [[W:c:marvel:Ultimate X-Men Vol 1|''Ultimate X-Men'']], and [[W:c:marvel:Ultimate Fantastic Four Vol 1|''Ultimate Fantastic Four'']]. Recently he provided every cover for the [[W:c:marvel:Secret Empire (Event)|''Secret Empire'']] event and the [[W:c:marvel:Avengers: No Surrender|''Avengers: No Surrender'']] storyline.
